Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We are given several tables Orders Order Lines Delivery Invoice Payments Products optional and Resources optional. Goal Create an event log with Case ID order_id Activity Name Timestamp Resource Actor optional Other Attributes.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps 1 Identify cases Use order_id as Case ID 2 Derive activities a Order Created from Orders table b Items Picked from Order Lines table c Order Dispatched and Order Arrived from Delivery table d Invoice Issued from Invoice table e Payment Received from Payments table.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Map Timestamps For Items Picked multiple per order produce one event per item since meaningful or summarize but problem says Items Picked events from Order Lines table so multiple picking events per order. Similarly multiple deliveries so multiple dispatch and arrival events.

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define activities and sources 1 Order Created timestamp order_date resource sales_person_id other customer_id customer_type order_priority 2 Item Picked timestamp item_picking_date resource picker_id other item_id quantity 3 Order Dispatched timestamp delivery_dispatch_date resource carrier_id other delivery_id delivery_note 4 Order Arrived timestamp delivery_arrival_date resource carrier_id other delivery_id delivery_note 5 Invoice Issued timestamp invoice_issue_date resource billing_person_id other invoice_id invoice_amount 6 Payment Received timestamp payment_date resource none other payment_id invoice_id payment_method payment_reference link via invoice to order.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Steps to create event log a Orders for Order Created b Order Lines for each Item Picked c Delivery for each Order Dispatched and Order Arrived d Invoice for each Invoice Issued e Payments via invoice for each Payment Received. Combine sort by Case ID and Timestamp ensure chronological order.

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Create event log by hand for each order list events Order 1001 created picks dispatch arrive invoice payment Order 1002 created picks two dispatch two arrive two invoice two payment Order 1003 created picks dispatch arrive invoice payment Order 1004 created pick no delivery no invoice Order 1005 created picks dispatch arrive invoice payment.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Include every event for every order_id maintain chronological correctness note missing data for 1004 document assumptions use resource ids from tables output as Markdown table with columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Resource Other Attributes.
